heading: Consultation
label: 7474 Consultation
text: The Under Secretary for Health shall carry out this subchapter after consultation with the special medical advisory group established pursuant to .section 7312(a) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the repeal of that section as part of the complete revision of chapter 73 of this title by .section 4124 of this titlePub. L. 102–40
Amendments1992— substituted “Under Secretary for Health” for “Chief Medical Director”.Pub. L. 102–405
amendments: Amendments1992— substituted “Under Secretary for Health” for “Chief Medical Director”.Pub. L. 102–405
